problem id: 48db5ccf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  01110111 -> 01111110
  01110011 -> 00111110
  11111001 -> 10001111
  01110100 -> 01001110
  01011101 -> 11011011
  00001111 -> 11110001
  01011100 -> 11001011
  10110111 -> 01100110
  01101011 -> 10111101
  10101001 -> 10000101

query: 01110110
predicted answer: 01101110
